scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.build:portable: npm run build && npm run package:portable --prefix server && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/stage-portable-launcher.ps1
scripts.build:portable:verify: npm run build:portable && npm run smoke:portable
scripts.audit:all: npm audit --audit-level=high && npm audit --prefix client --audit-level=high && npm audit --prefix server --audit-level=high
scripts.release:check: npm run audit:all && npm run audit:portable:deps && npm run build:portable:verify
